title: AI Hardware Startup Hark Valued at $6 Billion in New Funding Round
full_text:
AI Hardware Startup Hark Valued at $6 Billion in New Funding Round - Bloomberg
The AI Race:
Anthropic Files for IPO
Rethinking Data Centers
Disappointing ROI
Heavy Job Losses
AI Billionaires
Bonanza or Bubble?
Back Forward
Technology
Startups
Brett Adcock Photographer: David Paul Morris/Bloomberg
Gift this article
Contact us: Provide news feedback or report an error
Confidential tip? Send a tip to our reporters
Site feedback: Take our Survey
By Samantha Kelly
May 21, 2026 at 2:00 PM UTC
Save
Entrepreneur Brett Adcock ’s new startup Hark has secured over $700 million in a funding round that values the artificial intelligence-focused hardware company at $6 billion, including the money raised.
The Series A round was led by Parkway Venture Capital, with participation from investors including Nvidia Corp. , AMD Ventures, Brookfield, Intel Capital, Qualcomm Ventures and Salesforce Ventures.
